title: Synaptic Drift chunks.jsonl record (schema version 1)
description: A single chunk record. chunks.jsonl contains one such JSON object per line, in ascending id order.

id.description: 1-based chunk id, assigned in deterministic source order.

page_id.description: Id of the source page this chunk was derived from.

heading_path.description: Breadcrumb of the chunk's location, e.g. 'docs/auth/oauth / Configure OAuth2'.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the normalized chunk content.

summary.description: Heuristic one-line summary of the chunk.

token_count.description: Approximate token count (len(content) // 4); budget planning only.

source_url.description: Path or URL the chunk's page originated from.

source_commit.description: Git commit hash at build time, when known.
